name: Athletic
description: Can use the fire-escape exit. +1 AP on the first turn of each map.

name: Hypochondriac
description: Starts with 2 medkits instead of 1. Loses 1 AP on the first turn after taking damage in each map.

name: Vigilant
description: Sees enemy line-of-sight tiles. Cannot heal mid-map.

name: Resourceful
description: Starts with 1 flashbang. The starting tile carries an extra medkit.

name: Marksman
description: Pistol shots cost 1 less AP. Cannot wield shotguns.
